title: hymenophyllum trichophyllum
intro: Hymenophyllum trichophyllum, also known as the hairy filmy fern, is a species of small fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is native to Australia and New Zealand, and is commonly found in humid, shaded areas. The plant is said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum trichophyllum include its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, and it can be prepared as a tea or infused oil for its medicinal properties.
